system.description: Reach 20 feet / Long Reach. Accuracy penalty improves to -1d10 with 2+ Athletics ranks. Total Success may restrain or add 1 Extra Wound.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 5: Equipment and Goods
